DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Baker (415-954-4965) for Plaintiff/opposing party Farella Braun + Martell LLP.
Jonna Thomas (925-253-1717) of Hartog Baer Hand, specially appearing for Defendant Joshua Horowitz.
Elisabeth Thieriot (415-259-9900) Defendant, in propria persona
Court reporter: Sheila Pham CSR #13293 (415-274-9977).

DEFENDANT JOSHUA D. HOROWITZ'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT and DEFENDANT ELISABETH THIERIOT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT are heard concurrently.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) re: fraudulent intent, context of Q & A during OEX, defendant's solvency/insolvency, failure to file a motion for reconsideration, instead asked Court to re-decide what has already been decided, allow 30 days to file thorough answer. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ELISABETH THIERIOT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, Defendants have 10 days to file a general denial or alternatively 30 days to file a verified answer. All causes of action are sufficiently stated. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Sheila Pham CSR #13293 (415-274-9977). (D501)
